keyword.description: Instagram search keyword. Used verbatim in the IG keyword search query and seed URL generation. Do not add hashtags or expand the word unless explicitly included by the user.

timePhrase.description: The user's original time phrase, preserved verbatim. Any language. e.g. 最近30天, 上周, past month, last week. Just echo what the user said about time.

days.description: Positive integer. Number of days back to include (posting time window = now - days*24h to now). You are an LLM, so COMPUTE this from the time phrase. e.g. '最近30天' → 30, '上周' → 7, '过去三个月' → 90. Max 90 (IG API + pagination practical limit). Round UP for partial days (e.g. 'past 36 hours' → 2 days).
